summary: The implementation covers Internet Identity authentication (REQ-1), health routine tracking (REQ-2), AI chat interface (REQ-3), emergency contacts management (REQ-4), and health-focused UI design (REQ-5). All core requirements appear to be implemented based on the diff evidence. However, some acceptance criteria details are not fully verifiable from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can edit or delete existing routine entries
missing_requirements.reason: The HealthRoutineTracker component shows a form for logging new health data but the diff is truncated and does not show edit or delete functionality for existing entries. Only viewing and adding new entries are evident.

missing_requirements.requirement: Chat history is saved per user in backend storage
missing_requirements.reason: The HealthChatInterface manages chat messages in local component state only. No backend calls or persistence hooks are shown for saving chat history to the backend actor, meaning chat history would be lost on refresh.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can edit or remove emergency contacts
missing_requirements.reason: The EmergencyContacts component shows functionality for adding and viewing contacts, but the diff is truncated and does not reveal edit or delete functionality. No backend methods for updating or removing contacts are visible in main.mo.
